subcodes.first_line: Tablets were dispatched unto Salman, and in response to certain questions, specific pages were written and sent forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الواحی مع سلمان ارسال شد و در جواب بعضی از مسائل اوراقی مخصوص نوشته ارسال شد
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
